theme_and_archetype.domain: Enterprise SaaS, Developer Tools, AI Tool
theme_and_archetype.description: High contrast, technical, authority-driven aesthetic suited for an AI Debugger & Optimizer. Deep slate backgrounds with crisp borders and highly functional color coding for data analysis.

cards.style: Flat background (#1E293B), 1px solid border (#334155), no shadow. On hover: slight border brightness increase.
cards.usage: Used for the 6 analysis output sections.

buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 text-slate-200 border border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-slate-950 border border-slate-700 text-slate-100 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50 focus:border-blue-500

badges.style: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links should visibly lighten on hover. Cards should have a subtle border color shift.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for color and border changes.
motion_and_interactions.entrances: Staggered fade-in (opacity 0 to 1, translate-y 4px to 0) for the 6 analysis output cards.

images.description: Abstract green light trails on black background - use for login/register page background with an overlay (e.g., bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm).

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React icons for all UI elements. For the app logo, use the 'Cpu' or 'Activity' icon from lucide-react with the primary brand color.

page_specific_guidelines.auth_pages: Split screen layout or centered card layout. If split screen, use the abstract technology background on one side with a heavy dark overlay.
page_specific_guidelines.dashboard: Header with Logo, Navigation (Dashboard, History), and User Profile. Main area: Workflow Input section at the top, followed by a 'Control Room' grid for the 6 analysis cards. Use distinct accent colors for icons/badges on each of the 6 cards to differentiate them visually.
page_specific_guidelines.history_panel: Dense list or table view showing previous analyses. Actions (share, delete, toggle public) should be icon buttons.
page_specific_guidelines.shared_analysis: Clean, read-only view. Remove the input section and show the 6 analysis cards directly. Include a 'Powered by WorkflowAI' subtle watermark/footer.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards. Use text-slate-50 for primary text against slate-900/slate-800.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have clear focus rings.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use raw HTML `<select>` or `<input type='date'>`, use Shadcn UI primitives when building forms or dropdowns.
Apply `Outfit` for headings and `IBM Plex Sans` for body text. Update index.css with Google Fonts imports.
Ensure all 6 analysis sections are visually distinct but follow the 'Control Room' dense grid design.
